textPlain:
There was also an introductory blog post submitted 4 days ago. 245 points, 108 comments. 
https://www.xtxmarkets.com/tech/2025-ternfs/
https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=45290245Some notable constraints: files are immutable, write-once update never. Designed for files at least 2MB in size. Slow at directory creation/deletion. No permissions/access control.
